rules: Do not repeat same category two days in a row unless user requests.
If fluency and accuracy both improved for 3 days, increase complexity one step.
If score drops for 2 days, reduce complexity and add confidence-first scenario.
If pronunciation is weakest, choose scenario with short controlled utterances.
Always keep one social or daily-life backup scenario for low-pressure practice.

fallbacks.noHistory: Use onboarding level and select one beginner-safe scenario.
fallbacks.highFatigueSignal: Set suggestedDurationMin to 8 and use low-pressure scenario.
fallbacks.userExplicitFreeChat: Skip plan generation and log free chat as optional training.
